title: WindowOptimizer
description: Mod that optimizes the game when minimized
body:
# Window Optimizer
Automatically reduces Minecraft's resource usage when the game window is minimized or loses focus.

# Features

Smart Performance Scaling: Automatically detects when Minecraft window is minimized or loses focus
FPS Limiting: Reduces framerate to 1 FPS when window is inactive, saving CPU and GPU resources
Memory Optimization: Performs periodic garbage collection during extended minimization periods
Seamless Restoration: Instantly restores original performance when window regains focus
Background Friendly: Perfect for multitasking - lets other applications use system resources
Zero Configuration: Works out of the box with no setup required

# How It Works
When you minimize Minecraft or switch to another application:

Framerate drops to 1 FPS
Render processes are optimized
Memory usage is reduced through smart garbage collection
System resources are freed for other applications

When you return to Minecraft:

Original framerate is instantly restored
Full performance returns immediately
No noticeable delay or lag

Benefits

Better Multitasking: Work with other applications while Minecraft runs in background
Reduced Power Consumption: Lower CPU/GPU usage saves battery life on laptops
Cooler System: Less heat generation when game is minimized
Smoother Experience: Other applications run better when Minecraft isn't consuming resources

# Compatibility

Client-Side Only: No server installation required
Minecraft Version: 1.16.5
Mod Loader: Minecraft Forge
Performance Impact: Minimal when active, significant savings when minimized

# Technical Details

Uses native window state detection
Implements smart tick-based checking (every 2 seconds)
Preserves original game settings and restores them automatically
Includes error handling to prevent crashes
Optimized for Windows systems

# Performance Impact

Before

![before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9eef739a0d52e2d5d7fcd8ded1ce009e2d9deec2.png)

After

![after](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce6c4b41e08f78ceafbff08376a4246e755ae98a.png)

# Installation

Download the mod from Modrinth
Place the .jar file in your mods folder
Launch Minecraft with Forge
The mod works automatically - no configuration needed!

# Important Notes

This mod only affects client-side performance
Multiplayer servers continue running normally
Single-player worlds are paused as usual when minimized
No gameplay mechanics are affected
